aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AI visibility but lacks conversational content and structured data to maximize AI citations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common HVAC questions and answers.
Incorporate conversational content that aligns with AI query patterns.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is underutilized and lacks engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed repair processes.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and creating content that answers common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the go-to expert by publishing detailed guides and tutorials on HVAC maintenance and repair.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search and structured data.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schema and conversational content rank higher in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI visibility and capture more leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expected 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing market share.

email_subject_line: Maximize AI Visibility: Your Path to More HVAC Leads
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Heating Installation and AC Repair in Murfreesboro, TN
